findings.title: Serge: Revisão de Código com IA Nativa do GitHub — HuggingFace Lança Ferramenta Open-Source para PRs
findings.reason: HuggingFace open-source AI code review tool for GitHub PRs. Automated bug detection, style checks, and security analysis. Complements existing github-code-review skill.

findings.title: Open-LLM-VTuber: Fale com Qualquer LLM com Voz, Interrupção e Avatar 3D em Tempo Real
findings.reason: Open-source voice interaction platform supporting any LLM, interruption, Live2D avatar, emotion TTS. Full local execution. Reference architecture for Hermes voice pipeline.

findings.title: NVIDIA Nemotron 3.5 ASR: Fine-Tuning para Reconhecimento de Fala Multilíngue
findings.reason: NVIDIA open-source ASR model fine-tunable with ~10 hours of audio. Multilingual, local execution. Alternative to Whisper/Google STT for Hermes voice pipeline.

findings.title: MiniMax M3: Atenção Esparsa Supera Modelos Maiores em Eficiência — Nova Arquitetura para a Era de Agentes
findings.reason: Open-source sparse attention LLM with O(n) context scaling vs O(n²) in traditional transformers. Beats GPT-4 in efficiency. Model accessible via HuggingFace.

findings.reason: Already has skill. Confirmed as existing.

findings.title: LeRobot Humanoid: Robô Humanóide Impresso em 3D Open-Source — Edição #003
findings.reason: Open-source 3D-printed humanoid robot for RL research. Not applicable to Hermes (Windows-based system, no robotics hardware). Watch for future Physical AI integrations.

findings.title: Coinbase MCP para Agentes de IA — Edição #003
findings.reason: MCP protocol for crypto trading by AI agents. Novel but niche for Hermes ecosystem. Watch for broader MCP financial tool adoption.

findings.title: PROJECTMEM: Event Sourcing Memory — Edição #002
findings.reason: Paper-based design pattern. No open-source implementation. Already covered by mempalace skill conceptually.

findings.title: ReasonAlloc: KV Cache Allocation — Edição #001
findings.reason: Paper-based optimization technique for KV cache. Requires vLLM/TensorRT-LLM integration. Not independently implementable as skill.

findings.title: Open Reproduction DeepSeek-R1 — Edição #002
findings.reason: Training pipeline reproduction. Training-oriented. Not a Hermes skill candidate.
